subcodes.first_line: O Asad! Upon thee be the peace of God and His loving-kindness. The letter of His honor 'Alí-Akbar - upon him be My glory and My loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسد علیک سلام الله و عنایته نامه جناب علی قبل اکبر علیه بهائی و عنایتی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
